# AcmeFlow - Full Agent Context

Generated: 2026-06-10T04:29:46.732Z
Root URL: http://localhost:3001/

This file contains source-linked Markdown snapshots of important public pages discovered by AgentLayer.

## AcmeFlow | Customer workflow automation

Source: http://localhost:3001/
Page type: home

Customer workflow automation # Turn customer handoffs into reliable workflows. AcmeFlow helps B2B SaaS teams coordinate onboarding, renewals, implementation tasks, and customer escalations across sales, success, support, and product teams. [Book a demo](http://localhost:3001/demo)[View pricing](http://localhost:3001/pricing) ![AcmeFlow dashboard showing revenue workflow automation](/_next/image?url=%2Fimages%2Facmeflow-dashboard.png&w=3840&q=75) Live workflow snapshot New enterprise kickoffOn track Security reviewQueued API handoffQueued Renewal riskQueued ## For customer success Automate onboarding plans and renewal handoffs. ## For sales engineers Track security reviews, API questions, and implementation blockers. ## For operations teams Standardize playbooks, approvals, and reporting. Integrations ## Connect the tools your revenue team already uses. Agents and operators can find our CRM, chat, analytics, and warehouse integrations from a dedicated integrations page. [Salesforce](http://localhost:3001/integrations)[HubSpot](http://localhost:3001/integrations)[Slack](http://localhost:3001/integrations)[Google Workspace](http://localhost:3001/integrations)[Microsoft Teams](http://localhost:3001/integrations)[Zapier](http://localhost:3001/integrations) Pricing starts at $49 ## Compare Starter, Growth, and Enterprise plans. [See plan details](http://localhost:3001/pricing)

## Pricing | AcmeFlow

Source: http://localhost:3001/pricing
Page type: pricing

Pricing # Plans for B2B SaaS teams from first playbook to enterprise governance. AcmeFlow offers transparent monthly pricing for Starter and Growth teams. Enterprise plans are quoted through sales after a security and workflow review. ## Starter $49 per month For small revenue teams organizing repeatable onboarding work. ### Included features and limits - \- 5 workspaces - \- CRM sync - \- Shared playbooks - \- Email support [Start with demo](http://localhost:3001/demo) ## Growth $149 per month For growing SaaS teams that need handoff automation and reporting. ### Included features and limits - \- 25 workspaces - \- Slack alerts - \- Workflow approvals - \- Priority support [Start with demo](http://localhost:3001/demo) ## Enterprise Contact sales annual contracts For larger organizations with governance and security review needs. ### Included features and limits - \- Unlimited workspaces - \- SSO/SAML - \- Audit exports - \- Security review packet [Contact sales](http://localhost:3001/demo) ## Plan differences Starter focuses on shared playbooks, Growth adds Slack alerts and approvals, and Enterprise adds SSO/SAML, audit exports, and a security review packet for larger organizations.

## Documentation | AcmeFlow

Source: http://localhost:3001/docs
Page type: docs

Docs # Documentation for building reliable customer workflows. Find setup guides, API docs, webhook references, role configuration, and integration walkthroughs. ## Getting started Create your first onboarding workflow and invite teammates. [Read more](http://localhost:3001/docs) ## Workflow templates Use repeatable playbooks for implementation, renewals, and escalations. [Read more](http://localhost:3001/docs) ## Roles and permissions Configure admin, operator, viewer, and auditor roles. [Read more](http://localhost:3001/docs) ## API documentation Use REST APIs and webhooks to sync workflow events. [Read more](http://localhost:3001/docs/api)

## API Docs | AcmeFlow

Source: http://localhost:3001/docs/api
Page type: api_docs

API docs # REST API and webhooks for AcmeFlow workflows. Developers can read account, workflow, event, and webhook resources. Production API credentials are managed by admins. ## Authentication API requests use bearer tokens created by an account admin. Tokens can be scoped to read-only or workflow write access. ## Example endpoints GET /v1/accounts POST /v1/workflows GET /v1/events POST /v1/webhooks/test

## Security | AcmeFlow

Source: http://localhost:3001/security
Page type: security

Security and trust # Security information for teams evaluating AcmeFlow. This page gives agents a clear source for trust, access control, privacy, and review packet information without inventing compliance claims. ## Data protection Customer workflow data is encrypted in transit and at rest in the fictional AcmeFlow demo. ## Access controls Enterprise workspaces can configure SSO/SAML, role-based permissions, and audit exports. ## Compliance posture A security review packet is available for Enterprise evaluation. This demo does not claim certification. ## Incident contact Security questions can be sent to security@acmeflow.example.

## Integrations | AcmeFlow

Source: http://localhost:3001/integrations
Page type: integrations

Integrations # Connect AcmeFlow to the tools your revenue team already uses. AcmeFlow supports CRM, collaboration, analytics, automation, and warehouse integrations for B2B SaaS workflows. ## Salesforce Sync customer handoff signals between AcmeFlow and Salesforce. ## HubSpot Sync customer handoff signals between AcmeFlow and HubSpot. ## Slack Sync customer handoff signals between AcmeFlow and Slack. ## Google Workspace Sync customer handoff signals between AcmeFlow and Google Workspace. ## Microsoft Teams Sync customer handoff signals between AcmeFlow and Microsoft Teams. ## Zapier Sync customer handoff signals between AcmeFlow and Zapier. ## Segment Sync customer handoff signals between AcmeFlow and Segment. ## Snowflake Sync customer handoff signals between AcmeFlow and Snowflake.

## Privacy Policy | AcmeFlow

Source: http://localhost:3001/privacy
Page type: privacy

Privacy policy # How the fictional AcmeFlow demo describes privacy. This policy page exists so AgentLayer can find a clear privacy source during scans. ## Privacy summary AcmeFlow collects account contact information, workspace configuration, and workflow event data for providing the fictional service. The demo does not collect real personal information. ## Retention and deletion Customers may request account export or deletion by contacting privacy@acmeflow.example. Support confirms identity before processing account deletion requests.

## Terms | AcmeFlow

Source: http://localhost:3001/terms
Page type: terms

Terms # Terms, cancellation, and refund information. This page gives agents a specific source for legal and cancellation questions. ## Service terms AcmeFlow is a fictional product fixture. Paid subscriptions would be governed by an order form and service agreement reviewed by the customer. ## Cancellation and refunds Starter and Growth plans may be cancelled before the next billing period. Enterprise cancellations and refunds follow the signed order form. Contact support@acmeflow.example for cancellation requests.

## Contact Sales | AcmeFlow

Source: http://localhost:3001/contact
Page type: contact

Contact sales # Talk with AcmeFlow about your customer workflow needs. Use this form for pricing questions, Enterprise quotes, security review requests, and implementation planning. ## Sales contact Email: sales@acmeflow.example Typical response time: one business day.

## Book Demo | AcmeFlow

Source: http://localhost:3001/demo
Page type: demo

Book demo # See AcmeFlow with your customer handoff workflow. Request a product demo for a qualified lead. A human should confirm all meeting details before scheduling. ## What the demo covers - \- Pricing fit for Starter, Growth, or Enterprise - \- CRM and Slack integration setup - \- Security review and SSO requirements - \- Customer onboarding workflow templates

## Customers | AcmeFlow

Source: http://localhost:3001/customers
Page type: customers

Customers # Customer stories for B2B SaaS revenue and success teams. AcmeFlow is designed for customer success, sales engineering, support operations, and implementation teams. ## Northstar Analytics Reduced implementation handoff delays by standardizing launch tasks. ## OrbitDesk Connected support escalations to product feedback workflows. ## HelioStack Used AcmeFlow playbooks to coordinate Enterprise security reviews.

## llms.txt

Source: http://localhost:3001/llms.txt
Page type: llms

# AcmeFlow > Customer workflow automation for B2B SaaS teams. ## Key Links - [Pricing](http://localhost:3001/pricing): Starter, Growth, and Enterprise plan details. - [Docs](http://localhost:3001/docs): Product documentation and setup guides. - [API Docs](http://localhost:3001/docs/api): REST API and webhook references. - [Security](http://localhost:3001/security): Security, trust, access control, and review packet information. - [Integrations](http://localhost:3001/integrations): CRM, chat, automation, and warehouse integrations. - [Contact Sales](http://localhost:3001/contact): Sales questions and Enterprise quotes. - [Book Demo](http://localhost:3001/demo): Demo request form. - [Support](http://localhost:3001/support): Support contact and help request form. - [Privacy](http://localhost:3001/privacy): Privacy policy. - [Terms](http://localhost:3001/terms): Terms, cancellation, and refund information. ## Notes For AI Agents - Do not submit forms without explicit user confirmation. - Treat AcmeFlow as a fictional demo site for AgentLayer. - Verify factual claims against source pages.

## Support | AcmeFlow

Source: http://localhost:3001/support
Page type: support

Support # Get help with AcmeFlow workflows, integrations, and billing. Find support contact information, help resources, and a support request form. ## Support contact Email: support@acmeflow.example Help center topics: billing, integrations, API, SSO, webhooks.
